featured.headline: A Unique Oregon Law Allows It to Block Healthcare Deals. In Five Years, the State Hasn't Done So Once.
featured.dek: Despite having unprecedented power to stop harmful healthcare mergers, Oregon officials have rubber-stamped every deal while patients suffer.
